data.title: New York Medical Cannabis Industry Challenges The State's System: $20M Fee Per Operator At Stake
data.description: The NYMCIA challenges New York's $20 million cannabis license fee in court, arguing it's unconstitutional and unfair to cannabis operators.

data.title: Robinhood Markets Grows Into 'Best-In-Class' Brokerage, Analyst Says
data.description: Analysts have updated coverage and raised price targets on Robinhood Markets after the company hosted its first investor day on Wednesday and showed significant growth across customers, assets under custody and trading volumes.

data.title: 12 Consumer Discretionary Stocks Moving In Friday's Pre-Market Session
Stock Markets Extends Record Highs, US Labor Market Recovers, Bitcoin Hits $100,000: This Week In The Markets
data.description: The U.S. stock market posted another week of strong performance, with major large-cap indices such as the S&P 500, the Dow Jones and the Nasdaq 100 extending their record highs.

data.title: DEA's Cannabis Rescheduling Hearing Set To Begin In January 2025 As Controversy Mounts
data.description: DEA's cannabis rescheduling hearing begins January 21, 2025, as the industry raises concerns over process transparency and political influence.
